notes: Labs grow as Maria's case progresses. LAB014 = HD8 pre-synthesis labs (treatment response evident: CK 1820 down, albumin 1.9 up, dsDNA 38 down). LAB013 = HD5 post-feeding initiation labs + MSA panel (all NEGATIVE — argues against primary DM, supports SLE-myositis). LAB012 = AP3 admission comprehensive panel.
